📊 BMI Classification

Underweight 18.5 ↓
Normal 18.5 - 22.9
Overweight 23 - 24.9
Obese 25 - 29.9
Severe Obese 30 ↑
BMI is a reference indicator.
Advertisement

© 2024 BMI Calculator

What is BMI Calculator?

A BMI calculator gives a fast body mass index estimate from height and weight so you can check a simple health-related metric in one step.

BMI Calculator helps when you need Calculate BMI in one tab instead of switching to desktop software or a temporary script.

How to use this tool

  1. Enter your height and weight values.
  2. Choose the correct unit system if the tool supports more than one.
  3. Review the BMI result and category range.

Common use cases

  • Checking a quick BMI estimate during personal health tracking.
  • Comparing changes over time as weight changes.
  • Preparing simple reference values before a health consultation.

Tips for better results

  • Use accurate recent measurements for better estimates.
  • Treat BMI as a rough screening metric, not a full health assessment.
  • Track the trend over time instead of overreacting to one reading.

Example workflow

Input example\nOutput example

FAQ

What does BMI measure?

BMI estimates body mass index using height and weight to provide a simple screening value.

Is BMI a full health diagnosis?

No. It is a simple estimate and should be interpreted with broader health context when needed.

Why use an online BMI calculator?

It gives a fast, convenient estimate without manual formula work or spreadsheet setup.
